entry.title: Your guide to SAP Signavio at SAP Sapphire, Madrid 2026!
entry.content:
Calling all process experts and transformation leads...

SAP Sapphire 2026 in Madrid is just next week so we’ve put together a guide for you on all must-knows related to SAP Signavio.  

We can´t wait to welcome you for the next part of our SAP Sapphire EMEA journey, where you will discover how SAP Signavio helps organizations turn potential into performance, from strategy to value through process excellence. This event series will also spotlight SAP´s bold new AI vision and reimagined Joule experience.

You´ll find us as part of the Business Transformation Management track again and we will be presenting our integrated toolchain which encompasses SAP Signavio, SAP LeanIX and WalkMe, combined with Tricentis and Syniti. Over at SAP Signavio, we´ll be focusing on how you can support successful process and ERP transformation with the power of processes and AI excellence.

You‘ll find here an easy to navigate breakdown of the key SAP Signavio activities such as keynotes and sessions you don’t want to miss. You will also discover how to talk to our experts, what we´ll be doing at the Experience Center and how to join us virtually. Make sure you stay to the end to hear about some of the extra entertainment we have in store for you!

 

Keynotes

SAP:

May 20, 8.30-10.00am –The Beginning of Better with Christian Klein SAP, Philipp Herzig SAP, and Sebastian Steinhaeuser SAP, Hall 8

 

 

Business Transformation Management:

May 20, 1.00-1.20pm - Build a transformation capability that delivers measurable value with Sam Masri SAP, Seren Kuru Gevgeli Deutsche Börse Group, and Akos Röszler Vodafone, Hall 10 Theater 16

 

 

SAP Signavio:

May 20, 1.30-1.50pm - Unlocking the New Frontier of Agentic Transformation with SAP Signavio with Dr. Gero Decker SAP,  Hall 10 Theater 17

As companies deploy hundreds of AI agents, the real differentiator is no longer automation alone but instead how intelligence is captured and turned into value. Discover how SAP Signavio solutions maximize AI agent impact with the new frontier of process excellence. Learn how to transform collective operational intelligence into sustained impact.

 

 

Session Highlights

Business Transformation Management:

  • May 20, 10.30-10.50am - Leaders in the age of AI: Transformation capabilities for real results with Dee Houchen SAP, Thomas Buck ZF Group, and Ali Khawaja Albatha Holding
  • May 20, 2.00-2.20pm - Take control of your AI agent lifecycle and turn innovation into impact with Tim Tiemeyer SAP and Rene Rudolph Sartorius, Hall 10 Theater 17

 

SAP Signavio:

  • May 19, 2.00-2.20pm - Crafting the future: The SAP Signavio solutions 2026 road map with Alessandro Petri SAP, Hall 10 Theater 17
  • May 20, 2.30-2.50pm - Why high performers focus on process excellence with SAP Signavio solutions with Josèphe Blondaut SAP and Elena Cheremukhina Takeda Pharmaceuticals, Hall 10 Theater 17

 

Talk to our experts 🗣️

Join us for 1 on 1 sessions in our expert center, where you can meet our experts who will offer practical guidance helping you with all your seemingly unsolvable problems and questions. Also join us at our demo stations to experience hands-on demos of our latest solutions.

 

 SAP Signavio Demo Booths:

  • Live showcase: The integrated toolchain for ERP Transformation – BTM1363
  • Manage, govern, and get more value from your agentic enterprise with SAP – BTM1364
  • Digital twin of the organization: strategic visibility for agentic AI – BTM1365

 

Experience Center ✨

Don´t forget to drop by our interactive showcase of SAP’s latest technologies, industry innovations, and strategic priorities at the Experience Center. This interactive experience will include SAP Signavio solutions and is designed to inspire future innovation and to get you thinking about new possibilities for your business.

 

🎉Don´t Miss Out!🎾

Celebrity Keynote from Roger Federer: Find your winning edge - May 21, 1 p.m.–2 p.m.

Join legendary tennis champion and philanthropist Roger Federer for his insights into excelling under pressure. Federer shares how his career-long lessons in versatility, resilience, and strategic thinking can help leaders deliver results no matter the business area.

 

 

Live performance from DJs Lola Bozzano, Mestiza and NEW CITY BEATS - May 20, 6:30 p.m.–10:00 p.m.

Dance the night away with the high-energy lineup we have in store for you. The night kicks off with pianist, composer and singer, Lola Bozzano, followed by genre-defying duo, Mestiza who have been reshaping club culture with their electronic, flamenco soul mixes. To close the evening, we have NEW CITY BEATS and their world-class production of enchanting visuals, vocals and exceptional musicians.

 

See you soon👋

Sapphire Madrid 2026 is right around the corner now so start planning your experience today! If you have any questions about SAP Signavio´s sessions, activities and offerings, feel free to send me an email or contact Jane Fu, Director Product Marketing at SAP Signavio.

entry.title: SAP Meetup in Cyprus: Networking and insights
entry.content:
SAP Stammtisch Cyprus: Real Talk on AI and the Core Dilemma

The time has finally come to gather the SAP community in Cyprus once again. This isn't just another networking event. It is a dedicated space for experts to sit down, reconnect, and dive deep into the challenges we face every day in the ecosystem. Our goal is simple: mutual support and high-level professional exchange in a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere.

For this session, we are putting two of the most pressing topics in the industry on the table:

1. The AI Revolution: Hype vs. Reality

AI is everywhere, but what is the actual "vibe" on the ground for SAP professionals? We want to move past the marketing slides and discuss the raw impact of Artificial Intelligence on our roles.

  • Will AI replace SAP consultants and developers? We will debate whether we are looking at a tool for efficiency or a total shift in the workforce.

  • Tangible Changes: How is the daily work changing right now, and what should we prepare for in the coming months?

2. SAP Standard vs. Custom Development: The Great Balance

The "Clean Core" strategy is the talk of the town, but real-world B2B requirements often tell a different story. We will share insights on how to navigate the tension between staying in the standard and building custom solutions.

  • When is Custom worth it? We’ll discuss the specific scenarios where a custom development provides a genuine competitive advantage and when it is just unnecessary technical debt.

  • The Decision Framework: What are the best practices for deciding between a standard process and a custom build? How do we justify these decisions to stakeholders?

Whether you are navigating an S/4HANA migration, managing a legacy ECC system, or looking to integrate the latest BTP innovations, your perspective is valuable. Join us for an evening of pragmatic discussion, shared expertise, and great company.

Let’s cut through the noise and get to the heart of SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sapphire 2026: SAP Community Speakers Series
entry.content:
I just a similar strategy with AI picking my brain what i want to talk about in my post:
I wrote out all the things i wanted to talk about, including references to documentations, other posts etc. After that AI something like "Deep research about those topics and references so you have a good knowledge about it".
After that i turned on voice/chat mode and turned AI into a Interviewer. Based on what i wrote down, it should me ask questions and follow up questions. So i can just talk about the things that where in my head. I really had a feeling that this got so much more information out of me and my brain and on to paper.
The transcript helped me a lot to get a good blog post and all the things i wanted to talk about.

entry.title: New User Interface - Performance Management | Category for Goals not displayed
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am looking for clarification regarding goal categories and evaluation types in SAP SuccessFactors Performance & Goals Management (PMGM).

In a Performance Form, I have two types of goals:

  1. Goals from the Goal Plan

    1. Created via Manage Team Targets
    2. Example: Revenue (EURm)
    3. In the goal details panel, the category and evaluation type (e.g. linear target evaluation) are clearly displayed.

 

2. Manually created goal on the Performance Form

  • Created directly in the Performance Template (Add Goal → Create from scratch)
  • While editing the goal on the form, there is a Category dropdown and I can select the same value (e.g. linear target evaluation).
  • However, after saving:
    • The category / evaluation type is not displayed in the goal details panel.
    • No target logic (baseline, thresholds, evaluation curve) appears.

 

If I can select a category (e.g. “linear target evaluation”) when creating a manual goal on the Performance Form, why:

  • is this category not shown later in the goal details?
  • and why does it not behave the same way as a Team Target created via Manage Team Targets?

Many thanks in advance for your help.

Best Regards,
Josef
